sourceMovie.title: Elemental
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Elemental (2023) as a family theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The family and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Elemental clicked for you, The Super Mario Bros. Movie (2023) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and fantasy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Elemental?
faq.answer: Try The Super Mario Bros. Movie, Frozen II, Puss in Boots: The Last Wish—each shares DNA with Elemental while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Elemental?
faq.answer: Elemental (2023) is best described as Family, Fantasy, Comedy, Romance, Animation. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Elemental worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this family lane.
